# Auto-generated by TofuPilot SDK Generator. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(tofupilot VERSION 2.0.0 LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

include(FetchContent)

find_package(nlohmann_json 3.11 QUIET)
if(NOT nlohmann_json_FOUND)
    FetchContent_Declare(json GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nlohmann/json.git GIT_TAG v3.11.3 GIT_SHALLOW TRUE)
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(json)
endif()

find_package(httplib 0.18 QUIET)
if(NOT httplib_FOUND)
    FetchContent_Declare(httplib GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib.git GIT_TAG v0.18.3 GIT_SHALLOW TRUE)
    set(HTTPLIB_REQUIRE_OPENSSL ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(httplib)
endif()

add_library(tofupilot INTERFACE)
target_include_directories(tofupilot INTERFACE
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>
)
target_link_libraries(tofupilot INTERFACE nlohmann_json::nlohmann_json httplib::httplib)
target_compile_features(tofupilot INTERFACE cxx_std_17)

if(BUILD_TESTING)
    add_subdirectory(tests)
endif()

include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
write_basic_package_version_file(
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/tofupilotConfigVersion.cmake"
    VERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION}
    COMPATIBILITY SameMajorVersion
)

install(DIRECTORY include/tofupilot DESTINATION include)
if(nlohmann_json_FOUND AND httplib_FOUND)
    install(TARGETS tofupilot EXPORT tofupilotTargets)
    install(EXPORT tofupilotTargets FILE tofupilotConfig.cmake NAMESPACE tofupilot:: DESTINATION lib/cmake/tofupilot)
    install(FILES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/tofupilotConfigVersion.cmake" DESTINATION lib/cmake/tofupilot)
endif()
